CVE-2020-19725.title: There is a use-after-free vulnerability in file pdd_simplifier.cp ...
CVE-2020-19725.summary: There is a use-after-free vulnerability in file pdd_simplifier.cpp in Z3 before 4.8.8. It occurs when the solver attempt to simplify the constraints and causes unexpected memory access. It can cause segmentation faults or arbitrary code execution.
